title: Arknights skills
description: Add skills based on the professions in game Arknights into the game based on Pufferfish's skills
body:
This mod adds the skills of different professions from the game Arknights into minecraft base on the Pufferfish's skills mod. So you can have different skill trees to train your talents to improve the game expereince. Here are the professions added into game:
- vanguard
- guard
- sniper
- caster
- medic
- defender
- supporter
- specialist

If there are any issues about the mod or any bugs, please tell me. 

The difference between part and full edition is that the full edition adds the dependency for Iron's spell 'n spellbooks and Ars Nouveau. The part edition will remove three magic professions.
